Quality Education.reason: The course is fundamentally about quality education for indigenous peoples (Target 4.5) and appreciating cultural diversity (Target 4.7) through '族語教材教法' (indigenous language teaching methods).
evidence: Teaching Methods and Materials of Taiwanese Indigenous Languages
探討當代的族語教材及其教法

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course directly addresses Target 10.2 by promoting the social inclusion and empowerment of indigenous peoples through the preservation and teaching of their languages ('原住民族語言教材').

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Directly supports Target 11.4 by strengthening efforts to safeguard intangible cultural heritage, as the course focuses on teaching methods for 'Taiwanese Indigenous Languages'.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Supports Target 16.7 (inclusive participation) and 16.b (non-discriminatory policies) by teaching the implementation of the '原住民族語文課程綱要' (indigenous language curriculum guidelines).
